samples.formatted:
Chocolate Layer Cake

Ingredients:
- flour onion
- shortening
- water
- salt

Instructions:
1. Dissolve shortening in water
2. Add onion, flour and salt
3. Beat with fork until
4. smooth. and < a ball
5. into
6. squares and drop into boiling broth
7. Cook 1 minute
8. Drain
9. broth
10. Save broth
11. Measure 1 cup of broth
12. Bring soup to a boil
13. Cook for <NEXT_
14. 20 minutes
15. Add 1 cup chicken broth and cook until thick
16. Serve
17. Serves 6 to 8

samples.title: Chocolate Layer Cake
steps: Mash together mashed potatoes, add in the egg sugar vanilla thoroughly. Add in flour, salt and soda
Drop by spoonfuls on a greased cookie sheet
Bake at 375 degrees for 10 min 10 min
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Layer Cake

Ingredients:
- potatoes eggs
- sugar
- flour
- salt
- vanilla

Instructions:
1. Mash together mashed potatoes, add in the egg sugar vanilla thoroughly. Add in flour, salt and soda
2. Mix well
3. Add in nuts
4. Drop by spoonfuls on a greased cookie sheet
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 min 10 min
6. Makes 3 dozen dozen large cookies

samples.title: Chocolate Layer Cake
steps: Combine soda and salt and add to creamed mixture
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Layer Cake

Ingredients:
- shortening
- butter sugar
- eggs
- vanilla
- flour
- salt
- soda
- bananas
- nuts

Instructions:
1. Cream shortening and butter
2. Add eggs, one at a
3. Add vanilla and mix
4. Sift flour and baking powder
5. Add to creamed mixture
6. Combine soda and salt and add to creamed mixture
7. Stir in mashed bananas
8. Bake at 350 for 1 hour

samples.title: Chocolate Layer Cake
steps: Mix dry ingredients in large bowl
In blender, water, oil, eggs and vanilla
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Layer Cake

Ingredients:
- sugar
- flour
- INPUT <
- vegetable < oil
- water
- eggs
- vanilla
- walnuts
- semi-sweet chocolate chips

Instructions:
1. Heat oven to 350
2. Grease and flour two 9-inchinch
3. Mix dry ingredients in large bowl
4. In blender, water, oil, eggs and vanilla
5. Pour mixture into pans
6. Bake 25 minutes
7. Cool
8. Frost completely with
9. chocolate frosting
10. Yields
